title: United States International Driving Permit (IDP), issued by AATA
description: Apply for a U.S. International Driving Permit (IDP) — a translation document recognized in over 150 countries under the 1949 Geneva Convention on Road Traffic, valid only alongside a current U.S. driver's license — through the American Automobile Touring Alliance (AATA), the second of the two entities the U.S. Department of State authorizes to issue IDPs (the other is the American Automobile Association, see us/dos/international-driving-permit-aaa). Unlike AAA, AATA operates an online-only channel (aataidp.com) with no mail-in or in-person option. This document models AATA's publicly documented application steps and eligibility requirements and ends at submission; the live aataidp.com source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

operatedBy.name: American Automobile Touring Alliance
operatedBy.basis: Designated issuer of International Driving Permits under the 1949 Geneva Convention on Road Traffic and U.S. Department of State authorization (GSP-0020).

source.documentRef: AATA IDP Steps, FAQ, Application & Shipping, and Payment Methods pages (aataidp.com)

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from AATA's public informational pages (aataidp.com/idp-steps, /faq, /application-and-shipping, /payment-methods): the three-step process (digital passport photo, digital driver's-license images, online application), the 18+/valid-US-license eligibility rule (identical to the federal/treaty requirement documented on AAA's own printed form, since both are authorized issuers of the same underlying permit), the online-only channel with no mail or in-person option, the $20 permit fee plus $9 photo-processing fee, shipping tiers, and the one-year validity with mandatory annual reapplication. AATA's actual application form at aataidp.com/application is a client-rendered page that could not be captured field-by-field (a plain fetch returns only the informational shell, not the live form's field set), so this document is scoped to the process/requirement level the informational pages document, not a verbatim transcription of the live form's field names or ordering — a coarser granularity than the companion us/dos/international-driving-permit-aaa schema, which was derived from AAA's own printed application PDF. Authored per GSP-0020 (accepted 2026-07-02), the second authority.operatedBy schema, resolving GOV-587 alongside the AAA schema. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: applicantIsAtLeast18
fields.label: Applicant is eighteen years or older
fields.description: Issuance is restricted to applicants 18 years or older who hold a valid U.S. driver's license.

fields.name: holdsValidUSLicense
fields.label: Holds a valid U.S. driver's license
fields.description: U.S. citizenship is not required, but a foreign driver's license does not qualify. The IDP is valid only when used together with this current license.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: driversLicenseNumber
fields.label: Driver's license number
fields.sourceRef: aataidp.com/idp-steps — 'Scan or Take Photos of the Front and Back of Your Current Driver's License' step

fields.name: driversLicenseExpirationDate
fields.label: Driver's license expiration date
fields.sourceRef: aataidp.com/idp-steps — 'Scan or Take Photos of the Front and Back of Your Current Driver's License' step

fields.name: driversLicenseFrontImageProvided
fields.label: Digital image of driver's license, front
fields.sourceRef: aataidp.com/idp-steps — Step 2, front and back of current driver's license

fields.name: driversLicenseBackImageProvided
fields.label: Digital image of driver's license, back
fields.sourceRef: aataidp.com/idp-steps — Step 2, front and back of current driver's license

fields.name: digitalPassportPhotoProvided
fields.label: Digital passport-type photo provided
fields.description: AATA is an online-only channel: the photo is captured/uploaded digitally rather than mailed as a physical print.

fields.name: shippingAddress
fields.label: Shipping address
fields.description: AATA does not ship IDPs to Albania, Czech Republic, Greece, Montenegro, or Turkey.

fields.name: shippingMethod
fields.label: Shipping method
fields.description: domestic_priority (3-5 business days, $16); domestic_priority_express (2-3 business days, $37); international_standard (6-10 business days, $69); international_priority (3-5 business days, $99); international_priority_select_countries (3-5 business days, $165, for select countries with higher carrier costs).

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.label: Payment method
fields.description: AATA accepts US-issued and most internationally-issued magstripe/chip cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover, JCB, UnionPay International), Apple Pay, and ACH bank transfer.

fields.name: certifiesInformationTrueAndLicenseValid
fields.label: Certifies the information is true and the license is valid
fields.description: Certification submitted with the online application, analogous to the signed certification on the companion AAA paper form.
